title: Unilever Nigeria EPS Jumps bu 15.3% - FinancialEDGE
description: Unilever Nigeria Plc released its unaudited third quarter financial results for the period ended September 30, 2025, showing impressive growth driven by robust revenue expansion and disciplined cost management. The company's earnings per share (EPS) jumped 15.3% year-on-year to N1.32, with nine months 2025 EPS growing by 99.7% year-on-year to N3.83. Revenue expanded by 43.5%
html:
Unilever Nigeria Plc released its unaudited third quarter financial results for the period ended September 30, 2025, showing impressive growth driven by robust revenue expansion and disciplined cost management.

The company’s earnings per share (EPS) jumped 15.3% year-on-year to N1.32, with nine months 2025 EPS growing by 99.7% year-on-year to N3.83.

Revenue expanded by 43.5% year-on-year, driven by effective pricing strategy and moderate volume gains.

EBITDA margin grew by 334 basis points year-on-year to 21.6%, reflecting marginal increase in operating expenses.

Profit after tax rose by 15.3% year-on-year to N7.58 billion, despite a higher effective tax rate.
